posts.text:
100% to 0%. 

The liberal media wishfully claims "MAGA is divided!" over President Trump's decisive action against Iranian terrorists. 

Nothing could be further from the truth.


Steven Cheung (@StevenCheung47)

100%





— https://nitter.net/StevenCheung47/status/2034345664650293546#m

The disdain that Democrats have for working TSA officers is outrageous. 

Democrats like Chuck Schumer are directly responsible for TSA agents working without pay, for the massive lines at airports, and for putting our security at risk.


TSA (@TSA)

Some TSA officers can’t afford gas to drive to work because they aren’t getting paid.

Democrats must end their DHS shutdown immediately.



— https://nitter.net/TSA/status/2033582172142002215#m

Kim Hammer is a strong conservative, he's a pastor, and he's a man of integrity. 

He will make a great Secretary of State and I encourage every Arkansas Republican--get out and vote for Kim on the March 31st runoff election.

In 2020, Republicans and President Trump tried to refill the Strategic Petroleum Reserve at $20 a barrel. 

Chuck Schumer and Democrats blocked it from happening.
